description_long: This is a robust, industrial-grade cylindrical storage tank with a vertical orientation, constructed primarily from metal and featuring a weathered, utilitarian finish. The tank is equipped with two large hand-operated wheel valves on opposite sides, and a control panel with dual pressure gauges and switches mounted on the upper front. Prominent welded seams and surface wear suggest heavy-duty use, while Cyrillic stenciling, including the word 'ОПАСНО' (danger), indicates hazardous contents. The tank stands on three sturdy, flanged legs, elevating it above the ground for stability and access. Additional features include several bolted access panels and reinforced bands encircling the body, with visible signs of rust and grime consistent with prolonged outdoor or industrial exposure.
description: A heavy-duty, cylindrical metal storage tank with wheel valves, pressure gauges, Cyrillic warning labels, and a weathered industrial finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with two pressure gauges, Cyrillic label 'A3OT', and a wheel valve on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large wheel valve, Cyrillic warning 'ОПАСНО', and visible welded seams.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single wheel valve, access panel, and partial Cyrillic text, showing more of the tank's structural bands.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a wheel valve and reinforced bands, emphasizing the tank's cylindrical form and surface wear.
